description: Curated public work log entries for sainsbury.ai. Keep entries public-safe and high level; do not include private task state, raw clinical details, inbox content, or collaborator-sensitive material.

items.title: sainsbury.ai first public version
items.summary: Launched the first bare-bones version of sainsbury.ai as a static GitHub Pages site, connected the custom domain, and shaped the initial public pages for projects and outputs.
items: Set up the Astro static site and GitHub Pages deployment workflow.
Connected sainsbury.ai with HTTPS and Proton-backed public email.
Seeded the outputs page from the public Google Scholar profile.
Added a lightweight monthly publication-update check that opens a review issue rather than auto-publishing changes.
